evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.2 to 8.4. Here's my current code: before-8.4-validation-flow.tsx, and my package.json: package_8.2.json. I want fine-grained progress feedback as the validation flow accumulates partial results.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps the package versions in package.json from 8.2 to 8.4, then adds the optional didUpdateValidationFlowResult method to the existing LabelCaptureValidationFlowListener. The existing didCaptureLabelWithFields and didSubmitManualInputForField callbacks are preserved.

assertions.text: didUpdateValidationFlowResult is added to the LabelCaptureValidationFlowListener
didUpdateValidationFlowResult signature includes (type, asyncId, fields, getFrameData) parameters
The setup-check mentions running npx pod-install after the version bump
The setup-check mentions restarting Metro with --reset-cache
